title: onobrychis alba
intro: Onobrychis alba, also known as white melilot or hoary bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Onobrychis alba include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as gastrointestinal problems and respiratory infections.
